channel.title: Crop Circles on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Crop Circles on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Linda Moulton Howe
item.description:
Linda Moulton Howe is an American investigative journalist and documentary filmmaker who rose to prominence for her reporting on environmental issues and, later, for her work in the field of ufology. She gained significant attention in 1980 for producing the documentary A Strange Harvest, which explored cattle mutilation theories and alleged extraterrestrial involvement in government activities. Throughout her career, Howe has contributed to numerous television programs and media projects related to UFOs, crop circles, and alien abductions, while frequently appearing as a guest on platforms like Coast to Coast AM. While some supporters regard her as a leading figure in the investigation of unexplained phenomena, critics such as Joe Nickell have characterized her work as credulous and lacking in verified evidence.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Linda_Moulton_Howe
